# Social Preview Image

This directory contains the social preview image for the Verdict project.

## File: social-preview.png

A dynamically generated social preview image showing:
- Project name: **Verdict**
- Project owner: **eliasstepanik**
- Technology: **Rust** (language detection)
- Pattern: **Circuit Board** (visual theme)
- Theme: **Dark**

Generated by [socialify.git.ci](https://socialify.git.ci/)

### Usage

To set this as the repository's social preview image in GitHub:

1. Navigate to your repository settings
2. Scroll down to the "Social preview" section
3. Click "Edit"
4. Upload `social-preview.png`
5. Click "Save"

This image will be displayed when the repository is shared on social media platforms (Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, etc.).

### Regenerating

To regenerate with different parameters, visit:
```
https://socialify.git.ci/eliasstepanik/verdict/png?description=1&font=Source+Code+Pro&language=1&name=1&owner=1&pattern=Circuit+Board&theme=Dark
```

Customize the parameters as needed:
- `description=1|0` - Show/hide project description
- `font=Font+Name` - Change font
- `language=1|0` - Show/hide language
- `name=1|0` - Show/hide repository name
- `owner=1|0` - Show/hide owner name
- `pattern=PatternName` - Change background pattern
- `theme=Dark|Light` - Change color theme
